summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Watchlist Seeding and Auth Sync features. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend login flow works correctly with localStorage tokens and postMessage events for extension sync.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with unique timestamps to verify seeding behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: All watchlist seeding and auth sync features are working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_watchlist_seeding.py cover: signup seeding (7 policies), idempotent seeding, delete without re-seed, existing user no-seed, marker filtering, login/logout, token refresh.

backend_tests.TestAuthEndpoints::test_login_returns_jw: PASSED - Login returns valid access and refresh JWTs
backend_tests.TestSignupSeeding::test_signup_seeds_7_p: PASSED - New signup gets exactly 7 curated policies (Groq, ElevenLabs, Fal.ai, Replicate, Perplexity, Supabase, Vercel)
backend_tests.TestSignupSeeding::test_seeding_is_idemp: PASSED - Multiple GET /api/accepted-terms calls return same 7 policies
backend_tests.TestDeleteSeededPolicy::test_delete_seed: PASSED - Deleting a seeded policy results in 6 policies (no re-seeding)
backend_tests.TestExistingUserNoSeeding::test_existing: PASSED - Existing user with real entries is not seeded
backend_tests.TestTokenRefresh::test_token_refresh: PASSED - Token refresh returns new access and refresh tokens

frontend_tests.localStorage_tokens: PASSED - access_token, refresh_token, distil_auth_tick all set in localStorage
frontend_tests.postMessage_event: PASSED - DISTIL_AUTH_UPDATE postMessage emitted with access and refresh tokens
frontend_tests.watchlist_display_existing_user: PASSED - Existing user (test@example.com) shows 1 real entry, no seeded policies (correct behavior)
frontend_tests.watchlist_display_new_user: PASSED - New user sees all 7 seeded policies in Watchlist UI

verified_features: POST /api/signup seeds 7 curated policies for new users
GET /api/accepted-terms lazy-seeds for users with zero entries
Existing users with real entries are not seeded
Frontend login sets localStorage.distil_auth_tick for cross-tab sync
Watchlist UI displays all 7 seeded policies for new users
